import torch
import torch.nn as nn

class DKT(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.3):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.embed_dim = embed_dim
        self.hidden_dim = hidden_dim

        # Classic combined interaction embedding (skill_id * 2 + correct)
        self.interaction_embed = nn.Embedding(num_skills * 2, embed_dim)
        self.input_norm = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)

        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(
            embed_dim, hidden_dim, num_layers,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0
        )
        # Initialize forget gate bias to 1.0 for better gradient flow
        for name, param in self.lstm.named_parameters():
            if 'bias' in name:
                n = param.size(0)
                param.data[n // 4:n // 2].fill_(1.0)

        self.output_norm = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

        # Causal self-attention over LSTM outputs
        self.attn_q = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim, bias=False)
        self.attn_k = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim, bias=False)
        self.attn_v = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim, bias=False)
        self.attn_scale = hidden_dim ** -0.5
        self.attn_out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.attn_norm = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)
        self.attn_dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):
        interact = skill_ids * 2 + corrects
        x = self.interaction_embed(interact)
        x = self.input_norm(x)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        h, _ = self.lstm(x)
        h = self.output_norm(h)
        h = self.dropout(h)

        # Causal self-attention
        B, T, H = h.shape
        q = self.attn_q(h)
        k = self.attn_k(h)
        v = self.attn_v(h)
        scores = torch.matmul(q, k.transpose(-2, -1)) * self.attn_scale  # [B, T, T]
        causal_mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(T, T, device=h.device), diagonal=1).bool()
        scores = scores.masked_fill(causal_mask.unsqueeze(0), float('-inf'))
        attn_weights = torch.softmax(scores, dim=-1)
        attn_weights = self.attn_dropout(attn_weights)
        context = torch.matmul(attn_weights, v)  # [B, T, H]
        context = self.attn_out(context)
        h = h + context
        h = self.attn_norm(h)
        h = self.dropout(h)

        logits = self.out(h[:, :-1])
        return torch.sigmoid(logits)
